sentences.target: Regarde le troupeau de moutons qui passe.
sentences.reading: /ʁə.ɡaʁd lə tʁu.po də mu.tɔ̃ ki pas/

translations.fr: Regarde le troupeau de moutons qui passe.
translations.ipa: /ʁə.ɡaʁd lə tʁu.po də mu.tɔ̃ ki pas/
translations.en: Look at the flock of sheep going by.
translations.es: Mira el rebaño de ovejas que pasa.
translations.de: Schau dir die vorbeiziehende Schafherde an.
translations.it: Guarda il gregge di pecore che passa.
translations.pt: Olha o rebanho de ovelhas passando.
translations.vi: Nhìn đàn cừu đang đi qua.
translations.ar: انظر إلى قطيع الأغنام الذي يمر.
translations.nl: Kijk naar de kudde schapen die voorbijgaat.
translations.uk: Подивись на отару овець, що проходить.
translations.hi: गुज़र रहे भेड़ों के झुंड को देखो.
translations.el: Κοίτα το κοπάδι με τα πρόβατα που περνάει.
translations.nb: Se på saueflokken som går forbi.
translations.id: Lihat kawanan domba yang sedang lewat.
translations.sv: Titta på fårflocken som går förbi.
translations.ro: Uită-te la turma de oi care trece.
translations.cs: Podívej se na stádo ovcí, které prochází.
translations.da: Se på fåreflokken, der går forbi.
translations.ja: 通り過ぎていく羊の群れを見て。

tokens.explanation: Imperative 2nd person singular; main predicate issuing a command to look.
Definite article (masc. sg.); determiner of the noun 'troupeau'.
Common noun; head of the direct object noun phrase of 'Regarde'.
Preposition introducing a noun complement specifying the kind/composition of the herd.
Common noun (pl.); complement of 'de', indicating the herd consists of sheep.
Relative pronoun introducing a clause that modifies 'troupeau'; subject of the relative clause.
3rd person singular present; finite verb of the relative clause headed by 'qui', agreeing with 'troupeau'.

sentences.target: On a croisé un troupeau de vaches.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a kʁwa.ze œ̃ tʁu.po də vaʃ/

translations.fr: On a croisé un troupeau de vaches.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a kʁwa.ze œ̃ tʁu.po də vaʃ/
translations.en: We ran into a herd of cows.
translations.es: Nos cruzamos con una manada de vacas.
translations.it: Abbiamo incrociato una mandria di mucche.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi bắt gặp một đàn bò.
translations.nl: We kwamen een kudde koeien tegen.
translations.hi: हमारा सामना गायों के झुंड से हुआ.
translations.ro: Ne-am întâlnit cu o turmă de vaci.
translations.da: Vi stødte på en flok køer.
translations.ja: 私たちは牛の群れに出くわした。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun often used for 'we' in speech; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb (3rd person singular present) forming the passé composé with 'croisé'.
Past participle; main lexical verb in the compound tense (passé composé).
Indefinite article (masc. sg.); determiner of 'troupeau'.
Common noun; head of the direct object of 'croisé'.
Preposition introducing the noun complement that specifies the type of herd.
Common noun (pl.); complement of 'de', indicating the herd is of cows.

sentences.target: J'évite le troupeau de touristes devant.

translations.fr: J'évite le troupeau de touristes devant.
translations.en: I avoid the herd of tourists ahead.
translations.es: Evito el grupo de turistas que está delante.
translations.de: Ich meide die Touristengruppe da vorne.
translations.it: Evito il gruppo di turisti lì davanti.
translations.yue: 我避開前面嗰個旅行團。
translations.ru: Я обхожу впереди идущую группу туристов.
translations.pt: Eu evito o grupo de turistas à frente.
translations.vi: Tôi tránh nhóm du khách phía trước.
translations.nl: Ik mijd de toeristengroep daar vooraan.
translations.hi: मैं आगे वाले पर्यटकों के समूह से बचता हूँ.
translations.el: Αποφεύγω την ομάδα των τουριστών μπροστά.
translations.id: Saya menghindari rombongan turis di depan.
translations.ro: Evit grupul de turiști din față.
translations.ja: 前方の観光客の集団を避ける。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun 'je' elided before a vowel; first person singular subject attached to the verb.
1st person singular present; main transitive verb taking 'le troupeau de touristes' as direct object.
Definite article (masc. sg.); determiner of 'troupeau'.
Common noun; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Preposition linking the noun to its complement 'touristes' specifying the type of herd.
Common noun (pl.); complement of 'de', indicating the herd is of tourists.
Spatial adverb; locative modifier indicating position relative to the speaker or reference point.

sentences.target: Il y a un troupeau de chèvres ici.
sentences.reading: /il i a œ̃ tʁu.po də ʃɛvʁ i.si/

translations.fr: Il y a un troupeau de chèvres ici.
translations.ipa: /il i a œ̃ tʁu.po də ʃɛvʁ i.si/
translations.en: There’s a herd of goats here.
translations.es: Aquí hay un rebaño de cabras.
translations.it: Qui c'è un gregge di capre.
translations.pt: Aqui há um rebanho de cabras.
translations.vi: Ở đây có một đàn dê.
translations.hi: यहाँ बकरियों का एक झुंड है.
translations.el: Εδώ υπάρχει ένα κοπάδι από κατσίκες.
translations.ro: Aici este o turmă de capre.
translations.ja: ここにヤギの群れがいる。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/expletive subject pronoun in the existential construction 'il y a'.
Adverbial clitic pronoun; part of the fixed expression 'il y a' meaning 'there is/are'.
3rd person singular present; main verb in the existential expression 'il y a' ('there is/are').
Indefinite article (masc. sg.); determiner of 'troupeau'.
Common noun; postverbal NP presented by the existential construction (the entity that exists).
Preposition linking the head noun to its complement specifying the type of herd.
Common noun (pl.); complement of 'de', indicating the herd is of goats.
Deictic adverb of place; locative modifier specifying where the herd is.
